name: op_tab_focus_next
description: FOCUS / TAB (forward): three focusable divs (tabindex=0). Pressing Tab with nothing focused runs determine_keyboard_default_action → DefaultAction::FocusNext, which must land focus on the FIRST focusable element (#f1); a second Tab advances to #f2; a third to #f3. Each Tab is a key_down/key_up pair on "tab"; get_focus_state returns the focused node and assert_response {type:focus_state} checks the selector it hands back contains the expected id. A no-op key path leaves has_focus=false and every assert_response goes red.

css: .item { width: 120px; height: 30px; background: silver; font-family: "Azul Mock Mono"; font-size: 20px; }
